def negative_python_perf_layer_network_calls_large_response_downloaded_before_status_check():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_network_calls_large_response_downloaded_before_status_check"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Network calls. Flag response bodies read before checking status, headers, or content length guards."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
